assumptions: The developer has a modern browser and no existing SingleStore account or workspace.
The intended workload is learning or prototyping on Free Shared Edition, not production.

developer_goal: Register for SingleStore Helios, obtain a Free Shared workspace with an attached database, and run a first SQL query in the Cloud Portal SQL Editor.

first_success.outcome: SQL Editor returns a result set against the database attached to a Free Shared workspace.
first_success.observable_signal: SQL Editor displays the executed query's result set in the Cloud Portal.

route_selection.rule: Prefer Free Shared Edition as the no-credit Getting Started entry, starting at account creation, then query through portal SQL Editor rather than external clients.

candidates.name: Email signup then Free Shared workspace and SQL Editor
candidates.reason: Docs say email signup is available and Getting Started points Free Shared users to SQL Editor, but the post-Continue validation, agreements, verification, and whether Shared is created automatically remain incomplete.

candidates.name: Google or Microsoft signup then Free Shared and SQL Editor
candidates.reason: Peer identity providers; docs only say follow provider steps then the account exists.

candidates.name: Standard Edition trial workspace
candidates.reason: Consumes trial credits and adds provider, region, size, admin password, and firewall configuration beyond Free Shared.

candidates.name: External SQL client or Kai Shell first query
candidates.reason: Adds endpoint credentials or a different shell after the portal SQL Editor path already queries the attached database.

required_path.action: Create a SingleStore account from the Cloud Portal using email, Google, or Microsoft.

required_fields.label: Signup method
required_fields.notes: Email, Google, and Microsoft are peer options.

required_fields.label: Email signup form fields after Continue
required_fields.notes: Screenshoted initial fields exist in older docs context, but post-Continue validation and completion states are not established from current public evidence.

required_path.observable_result: The developer is signed in to the Cloud Portal with an organization.

required_path.action: Obtain a Free Shared workspace with its attached database.

required_fields.label: Shared workspace creation or selection controls
required_fields.notes: Unclear whether Shared is auto-provisioned at registration or requires an explicit create action.

required_path.observable_result: A Shared workspace and attached database are selectable in Workspaces.

required_path.action: Open SQL Editor for the Shared workspace and run a query against the attached database.

required_fields.label: SQL statement
required_fields.notes: Portal docs describe opening SQL Editor but do not publish one mandatory first query text for Shared Edition.

required_path.observable_result: SQL Editor displays a result set.

external_gates.description: Account creation may require accepting SingleStore terms and completing identity-provider authorization for Google or Microsoft routes.

unavoidable_waits.description: Any email verification or provider redirect delay during signup is possible but not documented in detail.

platform_outcomes.description: Free Shared Edition provides a shared-compute workspace with one attached database and no credit consumption.

excluded.item: Load Data and Run Queries sample that creates a sales database
excluded.reason: Tutorial warns free Shared users cannot create databases, so it is not executable for the selected edition.

excluded.item: Notebooks and Kai Shell as first query surfaces
excluded.reason: Documented peers; Getting Started presents SQL Editor for the general Free Shared database route.

sources.title: Sign Up to try SingleStore Helios
Connect with the SQL Editor
evidence_supported: SQL Editor runs queries in Cloud Portal

sources.title: Load Data and Run Queries into SingleStore
evidence_supported: Shared users cannot create databases warning

uncertainties.question: What validation, agreements, verification, password setup, and completion states appear after the documented email signup Continue action?
uncertainties.impact: Account action count and waits cannot be finalized.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Fresh-account walkthrough of portal email signup from first form through authenticated home.

uncertainties.question: Does Free Shared registration auto-create the Shared workspace and attached database, or must the developer create them explicitly?
uncertainties.impact: Adds or removes product-interaction steps between login and SQL Editor.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Post-signup portal capture for a new Free Shared user showing Workspaces state.

uncertainties.question: Which first SQL statement is required for Shared Edition first success?
uncertainties.impact: Without a mandated query, verification of the terminal step stays incomplete even if SQL Editor opens.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Official Shared Edition first-query text or a documented default sample query in SQL Editor.
